= Cross-Reference Targets

This document is the *target* end of an inter-document cross-reference. A sibling
document cross-references into a non-heading block nested in a deep section here,
and the preview must land that block clear of the sticky header — not behind it.
The post-load scroll is a different code path from the in-page anchor click
handler, exercised here against the element type (a non-heading block) that the
old heading-only offset failed to cover.

== Overview

A short lead-in so the deep target is not the very first block in the document.

=== Deep Section

This nested section holds the cross-reference target. The target itself is the
table below, anchored with `[#id]` — a non-heading block reached through the
inter-document scroll path.

[#deep-target]
.Deep Target Table
[cols="1,1",options="header"]
|===
|Key |Value
|alpha |1
|bravo |2
|charlie |3
|===

Everything below exists to guarantee a viewport-plus of scrollable content
beneath this table, so the scroll container can position it at the very top (the
only position that exposes header overlap) rather than bottoming out at the end
of the document.

==== Sub-detail A

Lorem ipsum filler prose adding vertical height beneath the deep target.

Another paragraph of the same.

==== Sub-detail B

More filler prose. The words are irrelevant; the vertical extent is what lets
the deep target reach the top of the viewport on load.

Another paragraph.

== Filler section one

Repeated prose to add height. Synthetic, deterministic, and plentiful.

A second paragraph of filler in this section.

== Filler section two

Still more prose so there is well over a viewport of content beneath the deep
target table.

Another paragraph here too.

== Filler section three

Yet more deterministic filler text to extend the scrollable height.

And one more paragraph.

== Filler section four

The last filler section. By now the deep target can be scrolled to the top edge
of the preview, clear of the sticky header once the scroll-padding inset applies.

A closing paragraph of filler.

Another closing paragraph, for good measure.
